action.reasoning: Observation: Ensemble with 4 models + 3 TTA achieved new best 81.68%. Time critically low (~5 min). Analysis: Adding more diverse checkpoints (warmup_best.pt, final_v2.pt) to ensemble could further improve. Also try 5-crop TTA for more diversity. Decision: Add remaining checkpoints to ensemble, submit eval quickly.
